title: Summary: Turn 786
content: `D:\workspace\KnowledgeBase\knowledgeBase` is a lightweight Java 8 + Maven knowledge base engine that extracts "notions" from multimedia (images, video, audio, documents) via OpenAI-compatible LLM, stores them in JSON or H2 database, infers relations, and visualizes as an interactive graph using React + Vite + Cytoscape.js.
